'''''Pizzazz'' 16''' is the sixteenth and final issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[January]] [[1979]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.<ref name="Issue 16" />

The issue includes the article "The Special Effects: How They Do It," discussing special effects in science fiction films, including [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']].<ref name="Issue 16" />
